meta.title: Barbershop The Brothers | Barber in Lelystad
meta.description: Sharp cuts, clean fades, and tidy beard work in Lelystad. Book your slot or walk in anytime.

about.title: Who we are
about.description: At The Brothers, we focus on clean results and a relaxed experience. Good service, no rush.

value1.title: Detail-driven cuts
value1.desc: From hairline to fade blend, every finish is done with care.

value2.title: Easy atmosphere
value2.desc: Grab a coffee, settle in, and leave looking fresh.

value3.title: Clear pricing
value3.desc: Straightforward prices so you always know what to expect.

items.name: Men's Haircut
items.desc: Classic or modern style, matched to your hair and routine.

items.name: Beard Trim & Shape
items.desc: Clean shape-up with balanced lines and neat contours.

items.name: Fade & Skin Fade
items.desc: Smooth blends and a crisp, polished finish.

items.name: Kids Haircut
items.desc: Comfortable and clean cuts for younger customers.

items.name: Hair Wash & Style
items.desc: Fresh wash and practical styling before you head out.

items.name: Combo: Hair + Beard
items.desc: A full grooming session in one appointment.

pricing.title: Price list
pricing.note: Prices may vary slightly for extra styling or specific requests.

booking.title: Book ahead or walk in
booking.fallback: Book your appointment online via Fresha
booking.walkIn: No appointment? Feel free to walk in!

items.text: Best haircut I've had since I've moved to the Netherlands. Great place, will definitely come back!
items.name: M. Johnson

items.text: Great service! I was welcomed, offered water and coffee before my cut. Very professional team.
items.name: A. de Vries

items.text: Amazing place... super efficient and professional. Atmosphere is amazing. Highly recommend!
items.name: K. Nowak

location.title: Location & opening hours
location.nearStation: 2 minutes on foot from Lelystad Centrum Station

footer.tagline: Sharp cuts, relaxed vibe, always welcome.
